CheckTitle: Security group restricts high-risk TCP ports from the internet
Description: Checks that ECS security groups do not expose high-risk TCP ports 25, 110, 135, 143, 445, 3000, 4333, 5000, 5500, 8080, or 8088 to `0.0.0.0/0` or `::/0`.
Risk: Public high-risk services can be scanned, brute-forced, or exploited, leading to unauthorized access, data exposure, and service disruption.

Code.CLI:
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 25/25 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 25/25 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 110/110 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 110/110 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 135/135 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 135/135 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 143/143 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 143/143 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 445/445 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 445/445 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 3000/3000 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 3000/3000 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 4333/4333 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 4333/4333 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 5000/5000 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 5000/5000 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 5500/5500 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 5500/5500 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 8080/8080 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 8080/8080 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 8088/8088 --SourceCidrIp 0.0.0.0/0
aliyun ecs RevokeSecurityGroup --RegionId <region_id> --SecurityGroupId <security_group_id> --IpProtocol tcp --PortRange 8088/8088 --Ipv6SourceCidrIp ::/0
Code.Other: Remove public IPv4 and IPv6 rules for high-risk ports, or restrict both `SourceCidrIp` and `Ipv6SourceCidrIp` to trusted CIDRs.

Recommendation.Text: Restrict high-risk TCP ports to trusted IPv4 or IPv6 sources.
